description_long: This sculpture is a stylized bust of a human head, featuring pronounced, geometric hair locks and a serene facial expression. The head is slightly tilted downward, with closed eyes and delicate, classical features reminiscent of Art Deco or early 20th-century design. The hair is rendered in bold, angular forms that contrast with the smoothness of the face, and the entire bust sits atop a rectangular plinth. The back of the head is smooth and rounded, with the geometric hair details wrapping partially around the sides. The material appears to be a dark, matte stone or cast metal, giving the sculpture a solid and weighty presence. There are no visible inscriptions or artist marks on the base in the provided views.
description: A stylized, geometric bust of a human head with angular hair and a serene expression, rendered in dark, matte stone or metal atop a rectangular base.
description_view_0: Front-left view showing the detailed facial features, downward gaze, and prominent geometric hair locks framing the face.
description_view_1: Rear-left view highlighting the smooth, rounded back of the head and the angular hair forms extending around the side.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the back of the head, which is mostly smooth with some angular hair elements visible on the sides.
description_view_3: Right profile view displaying the side of the face, the stylized hair, and the clean lines of the base.
attribute_location_context: No specific installation context is visible; the sculpture could be suited for display in an urban plaza, park, or gallery.
